name: __do_global_dtors
asm:
0x1400017C0      SUB      RSP, 0x28
  0x1400017C4      MOV      RAX, qword ptr [0x140003000]
  0x1400017CB      MOV      RAX, qword ptr [RAX]
  0x1400017CE      TEST     RAX, RAX
  0x1400017D1      JZ       0x1400017fd
  0x1400017D3      NOP      
  0x1400017D5      NOP      dword ptr CS:[RAX + RAX*0x1]
  0x1400017E0      CALL     RAX
  0x1400017E2      MOV      RAX, qword ptr [0x140003000]
  0x1400017E9      LEA      RDX, [RAX + 0x8]
  0x1400017ED      MOV      RAX, qword ptr [RAX + 0x8]
  0x1400017F1      MOV      qword ptr [0x140003000], RDX
  0x1400017F8      TEST     RAX, RAX
  0x1400017FB      JNZ      0x1400017e0
  0x1400017FD      ADD      RSP, 0x28
  0x140001801      RET
